blocks.text: Lisa, we're overdue for a team lunch, and I'd like to get one on the calendar before the quarter closes and everyone's schedule fills up. Could you find a Friday in the next couple of weeks, book the back room at the place around the corner, and put a hold on people's calendars? Nothing elaborate, just an hour together without laptops, and let me know if the usual spot can't hold all of us.
Once you've locked the date I'll write the group and make sure people actually turn up. Thanks for taking this on; the scheduling always seems to land on Lisa Flores, and I do notice.
